text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Happy Meek and Trainer Kiryuin want to train
with us, their role models and rivals, for our
mutual benefit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Specifically, Happy Meek has taken it upon
herself to issue a challenge to us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she says, I do believe it would be
beneficial for <chrname> too. We
eagerly agree to take them on!
